# vectormetrics

## Overview

`vectormetrics` is an R package for calculating landscape and shape
metrics for vector layers. Its aim is to provide a set of metrics that
can characterize landscape patterns and properties of the shapes defined
as polygons and multipolygons. Whole package is based on Simple Feature
geometry standard provided by **sf** package. Every function can be used
in a tidy, piped workflow, as it always takes the data as the first
argument and returns a `tibble`.

## Installation

You can download most recent development version of the package from
GitHub with:

``` r
remotes::install_github("r-spatialecology/vectormetrics")
```

## Using vectormetrics

### Function names structure

All functions in `vectormetrics` start with *vm\_* (for vector metrics).
The second part of the name specifies the level (patch - *p*, class -
*c* or landscape - *l*). The last part of the function name is the
abbreviation of the corresponding metric (e.g. *enn* for the euclidean
nearest-neighbor distance and *rect* for the rectangularity). Some
landscape and class level functions have also a suffix at the end, that
specifies the aggregation method (e.g. *mean*, *sd*).

``` r
# Patch level
## vm_p_"metric"
vm_p_area()
vm_p_square()

# Class level
## vm_c_"metric"[_"aggregation"]
vm_c_np()
vm_c_shape_sd()

# Landscape level
## vm_l_"metric"[_"aggregation"]
vm_l_lpi()
vm_l_square_mn()
```

### Examples

Some examples of calculating metrics on all levels and with different
class and patch columns.

``` r
library(vectormetrics)
library(sf)
data("vector_landscape")
plot(vector_landscape)
```

![](reference/figures/README-vector_landscape-1.png)

``` r
## Shape index
vm_p_shape(vector_landscape, class_col = "class")
#> MULTIPOLYGON geometry provided. You may want to cast it to separate polygons with 'get_polygon_patches()'.
#> This message is displayed once per session.
#> # A tibble: 3 × 5
#>   level class id    metric value
#>   <chr> <chr> <chr> <chr>  <dbl>
#> 1 patch 1     1     shape   5.06
#> 2 patch 2     2     shape   4.76
#> 3 patch 3     3     shape   4.80

## Number of patches
vm_c_np(vector_landscape, class_col = "class")
#> # A tibble: 3 × 5
#>   level class id    metric value
#>   <chr> <chr> <chr> <chr>  <int>
#> 1 class 1     <NA>  np         1
#> 2 class 2     <NA>  np         1
#> 3 class 3     <NA>  np         1

## Largest patch index
vm_l_lpi(vector_landscape)
#> # A tibble: 1 × 5
#>   level     class id    metric value
#>   <chr>     <chr> <chr> <chr>  <dbl>
#> 1 landscape <NA>  <NA>  lpi     49.7

## Mean squareness
vm_l_square_mn(vector_landscape)
#> # A tibble: 1 × 5
#>   level     class id    metric    value
#>   <chr>     <chr> <chr> <chr>     <dbl>
#> 1 landscape <NA>  <NA>  square_mn 0.232
```

### Utility functions

For now there are two utility functions available in the package. First
one is [`get_polygon_patches()`](reference/get_polygon_patches.md) which
breaks multipolygon geometries into polygons. There are two types of
neighborhood relations available: 4 (edge) and 8 (vertex). This function
enables users to create set of geometries from aggregated shapes and
analyze each shape’s properties separately.

``` r
vector_patches = get_polygon_patches(vector_landscape, class_col = "class", direction = 4)
vector_patches
#> Simple feature collection with 40 features and 2 fields
#> Geometry type: POLYGON
#> Dimension:     XY
#> Bounding box:  xmin: 0 ymin: 0 xmax: 30 ymax: 30
#> CRS:           NA
#> First 10 features:
#>    class patch                       geometry
#> 1      1     1 POLYGON ((1 2, 0 2, 0 3, 0 ...
#> 2      1     2 POLYGON ((14 5, 15 5, 16 5,...
#> 3      1     3 POLYGON ((12 18, 12 19, 12 ...
#> 4      1     4 POLYGON ((10 19, 10 18, 9 1...
#> 5      1     5 POLYGON ((5 20, 6 20, 6 19,...
#> 6      1     6 POLYGON ((6 21, 7 21, 7 20,...
#> 7      1     7 POLYGON ((3 16, 4 16, 4 15,...
#> 8      1     8 POLYGON ((2 24, 2 23, 2 22,...
#> 9      1     9 POLYGON ((10 20, 11 20, 11 ...
#> 10     1    10 POLYGON ((13 24, 14 24, 14 ...

vector_patches |>
  dplyr::mutate(patch = as.factor(patch)) |>
  plot()
```

![](reference/figures/README-get_polygon_patches-1.png)

``` r

## Shape index
vm_p_shape(vector_patches, class_col = "class", patch_col = "patch")
#> # A tibble: 40 × 5
#>    level class id    metric value
#>    <chr> <chr> <chr> <chr>  <dbl>
#>  1 patch 1     1     shape   1.66
#>  2 patch 1     2     shape   1.37
#>  3 patch 1     3     shape   1.51
#>  4 patch 1     4     shape   1.41
#>  5 patch 1     5     shape   1.13
#>  6 patch 1     6     shape   1.13
#>  7 patch 1     7     shape   1.13
#>  8 patch 1     8     shape   1.15
#>  9 patch 1     9     shape   1.13
#> 10 patch 1     10    shape   1.13
#> # ℹ 30 more rows

## Number of patches
vm_c_np(vector_patches, class_col = "class")
#> # A tibble: 3 × 5
#>   level class id    metric value
#>   <chr> <chr> <chr> <chr>  <int>
#> 1 class 1     <NA>  np        19
#> 2 class 2     <NA>  np        14
#> 3 class 3     <NA>  np         7

## Mean squareness
vm_l_square_mn(vector_patches)
#> # A tibble: 1 × 5
#>   level     class id    metric    value
#>   <chr>     <chr> <chr> <chr>     <dbl>
#> 1 landscape <NA>  <NA>  square_mn 0.845
```

Another utility function is [`get_axes()`](reference/get_axes.md) which
calculates the length of the major and minor axes of the shape. It is
used to calculate the elongation metric in
[`vm_p_elong()`](reference/vm_p_elong.md) but since length of axes might
be useful information itself, [`get_axes()`](reference/get_axes.md) was
exported as a separate function.

``` r
get_axes(vector_patches, class_col = "class")
#> # A tibble: 40 × 6
#>    level class id    metric    major minor
#>    <chr> <chr> <chr> <chr>     <dbl> <dbl>
#>  1 patch 1     1     main_axes 10.8   5.28
#>  2 patch 1     2     main_axes  9.64  7.84
#>  3 patch 1     3     main_axes  8.38  5.16
#>  4 patch 1     4     main_axes  3.6   2.22
#>  5 patch 1     5     main_axes  1.42  1.42
#>  6 patch 1     6     main_axes  1.42  1.42
#>  7 patch 1     7     main_axes  1.42  1.42
#>  8 patch 1     8     main_axes  4.24  2.82
#>  9 patch 1     9     main_axes  1.42  1.42
#> 10 patch 1     10    main_axes  1.42  1.42
#> # ℹ 30 more rows
```

## Contributing

This is an experimental version of the package, so any feedback and
contributions in the form of pull requests are welcome.

# Package index

## All functions

- [`calculate_vm()`](calculate_vm.md) : Calculate multiple vectormetrics
  at once
- [`clc`](clc.md) : CORINE Land Cover for Poznan.
- [`get_axes()`](get_axes.md) : Get major and minor axis
- [`get_circum_diam()`](get_circum_diam.md) : Diameter of smallest
  circumscribing circle(vector data)
- [`get_eac_perim()`](get_eac_perim.md) : Perimeter of equal-area
  circle(vector data)
- [`get_hull_area()`](get_hull_area.md) : Area of the convex hull(vector
  data)
- [`get_hull_perim()`](get_hull_perim.md) : Perimeter of the convex
  hull(vector data)
- [`get_polygon_patches()`](get_polygon_patches.md) : Get patches from
  polygon landscape
- [`list_vm()`](list_vm.md) : List available metrics in vectormetrics
- [`poz_buildings`](poz_buildings.md) : Buildings in Poznan
- [`urban_atlas`](urban_atlas.md) : Land use and land cover from Urban
  Atlas 2018
- [`vector_landscape`](vector_landscape.md) : Example map (random
  cluster neutral landscape model).
- [`vector_patches`](vector_patches.md) : vector_landscape object but
  with exploded multipolygons into polygons
- [`vm_c_area_cv()`](vm_c_area_cv.md) : The coefficient of variation of
  all patch areas at class level (vector data)
- [`vm_c_area_mn()`](vm_c_area_mn.md) : The mean value of all patch
  areas at class level(vector data)
- [`vm_c_area_sd()`](vm_c_area_sd.md) : The standard deviation of all
  patch areas at class level(vector data)
- [`vm_c_ca()`](vm_c_ca.md) : The total area of each class(vector data)
- [`vm_c_cai_cv()`](vm_c_cai_cv.md) : The coefficient of variation of
  ratio of the core area and the area at class level(vector data)
- [`vm_c_cai_mn()`](vm_c_cai_mn.md) : The mean value of core area index
  at class level(vector data)
- [`vm_c_cai_sd()`](vm_c_cai_sd.md) : The standard deviation of core
  area index of all patches at class level(vector data)
- [`vm_c_circ_mn()`](vm_c_circ_mn.md) : Circularity(vector data)
- [`vm_c_circle_cv()`](vm_c_circle_cv.md) : The coefficient of variation
  of Ratios between the patch area and the smallest circumscribing
  circle of all patches at class level(vector data)
- [`vm_c_circle_mn()`](vm_c_circle_mn.md) : The mean value of Ratios
  between the patch area and the smallest circumscribing circle of
  patches at class level(vector data)
- [`vm_c_circle_sd()`](vm_c_circle_sd.md) : The standard deviation of
  Ratios between the patch area and the smallest circumscribing circle
  of patches at class level(vector data)
- [`vm_c_coh_mn()`](vm_c_coh_mn.md) : Cohesion Index(vector data)
- [`vm_c_comp_mn()`](vm_c_comp_mn.md) : Form factor/Compactness(vector
  data)
- [`vm_c_convex_mn()`](vm_c_convex_mn.md) : Convexity(vector data)
- [`vm_c_core_cv()`](vm_c_core_cv.md) : The coefficient of variation of
  each class core areas(vector data)
- [`vm_c_core_mn()`](vm_c_core_mn.md) : The mean value of all core areas
  in each class(vector data)
- [`vm_c_core_sd()`](vm_c_core_sd.md) : The standard deviation of all
  core areas of each class(vector data)
- [`vm_c_cpland()`](vm_c_cpland.md) : Core area percentage of landscape
  in each class(vector data)
- [`vm_c_dcad()`](vm_c_dcad.md) : Disjunct core area density of each
  class(vector data)
- [`vm_c_dcore_cv()`](vm_c_dcore_cv.md) : The coefficient of variation
  of number of disjunct core areas in each class (vector data)
- [`vm_c_dcore_mn()`](vm_c_dcore_mn.md) : The mean value of number of
  core areas in each class(vector data)
- [`vm_c_dcore_sd()`](vm_c_dcore_sd.md) : The standard deviation of the
  number of disjunct core areas of each class(vector data)
- [`vm_c_detour_mn()`](vm_c_detour_mn.md) : Detour Index(vector data)
- [`vm_c_division()`](vm_c_division.md) : Landscape division index of
  each class (vector data)
- [`vm_c_ed()`](vm_c_ed.md) : Edge density(vector data)
- [`vm_c_elong_mn()`](vm_c_elong_mn.md) : Elongation(vector data)
- [`vm_c_enn_cv()`](vm_c_enn_cv.md) : The coefficient of variation of
  Euclidean Nearest-Neighbor Distance of all patches at class
  level(vector data)
- [`vm_c_enn_mn()`](vm_c_enn_mn.md) : The mean value of the Euclidean
  Nearest-Neighbor Distance of patches in each class(vector data)
- [`vm_c_enn_sd()`](vm_c_enn_sd.md) : The standard deviation of
  Euclidean Nearest-Neighbor Distance of patches in each class(vector
  data)
- [`vm_c_eri_mn()`](vm_c_eri_mn.md) : Equivalent rectangular
  index(vector data)
- [`vm_c_exchange_mn()`](vm_c_exchange_mn.md) : Exchange Index(vector
  data)
- [`vm_c_frac_cv()`](vm_c_frac_cv.md) : The coefficient of variation of
  fractal dimension index of all patches in each class(vector data)
- [`vm_c_frac_mn()`](vm_c_frac_mn.md) : The mean value of the fractal
  dimension index of all patches in each class(vector data)
- [`vm_c_frac_sd()`](vm_c_frac_sd.md) : The standard deviation of the
  fractal dimension index of all patches in each class(vector data)
- [`vm_c_fullness()`](vm_c_fullness.md) : Fullness Index(vector data)
- [`vm_c_fullness_mn()`](vm_c_fullness_mn.md) : Fullness Index(vector
  data)
- [`vm_c_girth_mn()`](vm_c_girth_mn.md) : Girth Index(vector data)
- [`vm_c_lpi()`](vm_c_lpi.md) : Largest patch index(vector data)
- [`vm_c_lsi()`](vm_c_lsi.md) : Landscape shape index (vector data)
- [`vm_c_mesh()`](vm_c_mesh.md) : Effective Mesh Size (vector data)
- [`vm_c_ndca()`](vm_c_ndca.md) : the number of disjunct core area in
  each class(vector data)
- [`vm_c_np()`](vm_c_np.md) : the number of patches in each class(vector
  data)
- [`vm_c_pd()`](vm_c_pd.md) : the patch density in each class(vector
  data)
- [`vm_c_perarea_cv()`](vm_c_perarea_cv.md) : The coefficient of
  variation of Perimeter-Area ratio index of each class (vector data)
- [`vm_c_perarea_mn()`](vm_c_perarea_mn.md) : Perimeter-Area ratio.
- [`vm_c_perarea_sd()`](vm_c_perarea_sd.md) : The standard deviation of
  Perimeter-Area ratio index of all patches at class level(vector data)
- [`vm_c_perim_idx_mn()`](vm_c_perim_idx_mn.md) : Perimeter Index(vector
  data)
- [`vm_c_pland()`](vm_c_pland.md) : Percentage of landscape of
  class(vector data)
- [`vm_c_proxim_mn()`](vm_c_proxim_mn.md) : Proximity Index(vector data)
- [`vm_c_range_mn()`](vm_c_range_mn.md) : Range Index(vector data)
- [`vm_c_rect_mn()`](vm_c_rect_mn.md) : Rectangularity(vector data)
- [`vm_c_rough_mn()`](vm_c_rough_mn.md) : Roughness index(vector data)
- [`vm_c_shape_cv()`](vm_c_shape_cv.md) : The coefficient of variation
  of Shape index of each class (vector data)
- [`vm_c_shape_mn()`](vm_c_shape_mn.md) : The mean value of Shape index
  of each class (vector data)
- [`vm_c_shape_sd()`](vm_c_shape_sd.md) : The standard deviation of
  Shape index of each class (vector data)
- [`vm_c_solid_mn()`](vm_c_solid_mn.md) : Solidity(vector data)
- [`vm_c_sphere_mn()`](vm_c_sphere_mn.md) : Sphercity(vector data)
- [`vm_c_split()`](vm_c_split.md) : Splitting index (vector data)
- [`vm_c_square_mn()`](vm_c_square_mn.md) : Squareness(vector data)
- [`vm_c_tca()`](vm_c_tca.md) : The total core area of each class(vector
  data)
- [`vm_c_te()`](vm_c_te.md) : Total (class) edge (vector data)
- [`vm_l_area_mn()`](vm_l_area_mn.md) : The mean value of all patch
  areas at landscape level(vector data)
- [`vm_l_cai_mn()`](vm_l_cai_mn.md) : The mean value of core area index
  at landscape level(vector data)
- [`vm_l_circ_mn()`](vm_l_circ_mn.md) : Circularity(vector data)
- [`vm_l_circle_mn()`](vm_l_circle_mn.md) : The mean value of Ratios
  between the patch area and the smallest circumscribing circle of
  patches at class level(vector data)
- [`vm_l_coh_mn()`](vm_l_coh_mn.md) : Cohesion Index(vector data)
- [`vm_l_comp_mn()`](vm_l_comp_mn.md) : Form factor/Compactness(vector
  data)
- [`vm_l_convex_mn()`](vm_l_convex_mn.md) : Convexity(vector data)
- [`vm_l_core_mn()`](vm_l_core_mn.md) : The mean value of all core areas
  in landscape(vector data)
- [`vm_l_dcad()`](vm_l_dcad.md) : Disjunct core area density of the
  whole landscape(vector data)
- [`vm_l_dcore_mn()`](vm_l_dcore_mn.md) : The mean value of number of
  core areas in landscape(vector data)
- [`vm_l_detour_mn()`](vm_l_detour_mn.md) : Detour Index(vector data)
- [`vm_l_division()`](vm_l_division.md) : Landscape division index
  (vector data)
- [`vm_l_ed()`](vm_l_ed.md) : ED (landscape level)
- [`vm_l_elong_mn()`](vm_l_elong_mn.md) : Elongation(vector data)
- [`vm_l_eri_mn()`](vm_l_eri_mn.md) : Equivalent rectangular
  index(vector data)
- [`vm_l_exchange_mn()`](vm_l_exchange_mn.md) : Exchange Index(vector
  data)
- [`vm_l_frac_mn()`](vm_l_frac_mn.md) : The mean value of the fractal
  dimension index of landscape(vector data)
- [`vm_l_fullness()`](vm_l_fullness.md) : Fullness Index(vector data)
- [`vm_l_fullness_mn()`](vm_l_fullness_mn.md) : Fullness Index(vector
  data)
- [`vm_l_girth_mn()`](vm_l_girth_mn.md) : Girth Index(vector data)
- [`vm_l_lpi()`](vm_l_lpi.md) : Largest patch index(vector data)
- [`vm_l_lsi()`](vm_l_lsi.md) : Landscape shape index (vector data)
- [`vm_l_mesh()`](vm_l_mesh.md) : Effective Mesh Size (vector data)
- [`vm_l_msidi()`](vm_l_msidi.md) : Modified Simpson's diversity index
  (vector data)
- [`vm_l_msiei()`](vm_l_msiei.md) : Modified Simpson's evenness index
  (vector data)
- [`vm_l_ndca()`](vm_l_ndca.md) : the number of disjunct core area in
  the whole landscape(vector data)
- [`vm_l_np()`](vm_l_np.md) : the number of patches in landscape(vector
  data)
- [`vm_l_pafrac()`](vm_l_pafrac.md) : Perimeter-Area Fractal
  Dimension(vector data)
- [`vm_l_pd()`](vm_l_pd.md) : the patch density in the whole
  landscape(vector data)
- [`vm_l_perarea_mn()`](vm_l_perarea_mn.md) : The mean value of all
  patches Perimeter-Area ratio index at landscape level(vector data)
- [`vm_l_perim_idx_mn()`](vm_l_perim_idx_mn.md) : Perimeter Index(vector
  data)
- [`vm_l_pr()`](vm_l_pr.md) : Patch richness (vector data)
- [`vm_l_prd()`](vm_l_prd.md) : Patch richness density (vector data)
- [`vm_l_proxim_mn()`](vm_l_proxim_mn.md) : Proximity Index(vector data)
- [`vm_l_range_mn()`](vm_l_range_mn.md) : Range Index(vector data)
- [`vm_l_rect_mn()`](vm_l_rect_mn.md) : Rectangularity(vector data)
- [`vm_l_rough_mn()`](vm_l_rough_mn.md) : Roughness index(vector data)
- [`vm_l_rpr()`](vm_l_rpr.md) : Relative patch richness (vector data)
- [`vm_l_shape_mn()`](vm_l_shape_mn.md) : The mean value of Shape index
  of landscape (vector data)
- [`vm_l_shdi()`](vm_l_shdi.md) : Shannon's diversity index (vector
  data)
- [`vm_l_shei()`](vm_l_shei.md) : Shannons's evenness index (vector
  data)
- [`vm_l_sidi()`](vm_l_sidi.md) : Simpson's diversity index (vector
  data)
- [`vm_l_siei()`](vm_l_siei.md) : Simpson's evenness index (vector data)
- [`vm_l_solid_mn()`](vm_l_solid_mn.md) : Solidity(vector data)
- [`vm_l_sphere_mn()`](vm_l_sphere_mn.md) : Sphercity(vector data)
- [`vm_l_split()`](vm_l_split.md) : Splitting index (vector data)
- [`vm_l_square_mn()`](vm_l_square_mn.md) : Squareness(vector data)
- [`vm_l_ta()`](vm_l_ta.md) : The total area of the whole
  landscape(vector data)
- [`vm_l_tca()`](vm_l_tca.md) : The total core area of the whole
  landscape(vector data)
- [`vm_l_te()`](vm_l_te.md) : Total (landscape) edge (vector data)
- [`vm_metrics`](vm_metrics.md) : Table with all metrics' names and
  descriptions
- [`vm_p_area()`](vm_p_area.md) : AREA (patch level)
- [`vm_p_cai()`](vm_p_cai.md) : Core area index(vector data)
- [`vm_p_circ()`](vm_p_circ.md) : Circularity(vector data)
- [`vm_p_circle()`](vm_p_circle.md) : CIRCLE (patch level)
- [`vm_p_coh()`](vm_p_coh.md) : Cohesion Index(vector data)
- [`vm_p_comp()`](vm_p_comp.md) : Form factor/Compactness(vector data)
- [`vm_p_convex()`](vm_p_convex.md) : Convexity(vector data)
- [`vm_p_core()`](vm_p_core.md) : CORE (patch level)
- [`vm_p_detour()`](vm_p_detour.md) : Detour Index(vector data)
- [`vm_p_elong()`](vm_p_elong.md) : Elongation(vector data)
- [`vm_p_enn()`](vm_p_enn.md) : Euclidean Nearest-Neighbor
  Distance(vector data)
- [`vm_p_eri()`](vm_p_eri.md) : Equivalent rectangular index(vector
  data)
- [`vm_p_exchange()`](vm_p_exchange.md) : Exchange Index(vector data)
- [`vm_p_frac()`](vm_p_frac.md) : Fractal Dimension Index(vector data)
- [`vm_p_fullness()`](vm_p_fullness.md) : Fullness Index(vector data)
- [`vm_p_girth()`](vm_p_girth.md) : Girth Index(vector data)
- [`vm_p_ncore()`](vm_p_ncore.md) : the number of disjunct core
  area(vector data)
- [`vm_p_perarea()`](vm_p_perarea.md) : Perimeter-Area ratio.
- [`vm_p_perim()`](vm_p_perim.md) : The perimeter of patch(vector data)
- [`vm_p_perim_idx()`](vm_p_perim_idx.md) : Perimeter Index(vector data)
- [`vm_p_proxim()`](vm_p_proxim.md) : Proximity Index(vector data)
- [`vm_p_range()`](vm_p_range.md) : Range Index(vector data)
- [`vm_p_rect()`](vm_p_rect.md) : Rectangularity(vector data)
- [`vm_p_rough()`](vm_p_rough.md) : Roughness index(vector data)
- [`vm_p_shape()`](vm_p_shape.md) : Shape index(vector data)
- [`vm_p_solid()`](vm_p_solid.md) : Solidity(vector data)
- [`vm_p_sphere()`](vm_p_sphere.md) : Sphercity(vector data)
- [`vm_p_square()`](vm_p_square.md) : Squareness(vector data)

# Articles

### All vignettes

- [Comparing metrics between vectormetrics and landscapemetrics R
  packages](comparing-with-landscapemetrics.md):
- [Metrics available in the vectormetrics package](vm_metrics.md):
